transcript.text:
I'm so hungry
[Kitchen on alert]
[Preparing everything on the menu]
How will she eat it all?
1 person can't finish this
[I'll finish it]
This restaurant is located near my restaurant
They are known for their sushi
I always see people waiting in line
We're on a break right now, so I came out for a meal
It's here
It took me like 10 steps to get here
[Sushiroro located near Isu Station]
This place is always packed with people
It's so cold
Let's head inside

Hello
Hello
I'm from next door Ms. Tzuyang
Do you know me? Hello
I'll seat you inside Thank you
There are 4 different types of sushi meals
Bluefin tuna sushi too
I'll order all the sushi on their menu
[Professional sushi chef]
[But there's only 1 person seated at table 3]
Our sushi pieces are about 1.5x bigger than other sushi places
The fish meat
She sure eats a lot
[Sushi tetris]
Can you finish everything?
I will eat everything, don't worry

Thank you
Looks delicious Bon appetit
Let's dig in
This sauce is for the bluefin tuna
I was told to use the brush to put the soy sauce on the others
Also told me to eat the beef first before it gets cold
Let's get started
The rice is falling apart
Yummy
I can taste the smoky flavor
Let's start in order
With some soy sauce
That's good
Really delicious
The rice falls apart
How do I explain this?

So it just melts in my mouth
I don't really need to chew that much
I have a lot of salmon, so I'll take 1
What is this? I don't even know what I ordered
I guess some salmon special
They give you a lot of meat It's like a blanket
The salmon oil
It's really soft
But it has a really nice texture
Very savory
Salmon is so good
How about the tail?
Why's this salmon so different? How is it so delicious
I can tell this is the Bigeye Tuna
That's tasty
I love the rice because it's not dry

It just falls dissolves
Amazing
Idk what this is
Wasabi..
[It will wake you up]
I'm tearing up
I'll give you a close-up
Look at the gloss
Even the salmon
These regular sushi pieces are so tasty too
Now I see why they wait in line
It's better than my restaurant's food
It's better
[Mean owner! -Garden Bunsik Chef]
It's chewy
What's this?

Garlic shrimp?
I must save that for last
But I want more
I really want some more, but I must resist That's so good
Conch
It's huge
That's good too
Now for the octopus
It's good..
Shrimp too
I don't like these prawns that much
The cooked ones
I've had some bad ones
That's pretty average
Others are exceptional
I've been to many sushi restaurants

I've never seen this brush method before
Dipping it in the soy sauce was very inconvenient
This is really easy
Just put some on and eat
Tasty
Let's focus on salmon since I have a lot
[Some miso soup]
I need to eat the eel too
While it's still warm
Is it an eel?
That's really good
[Dipping the brush inside the miso soup]
I dipped this in here Oh no!
Pickled garlic is a great palate cleanser
I wonder what my servers are eating right now
[4 loaves of bread..]

I treated them out yesterday
Spent 100,000 Won (~$90 USD) on stew
[Server 1] [Server 2]
I'll bring everyone here some other time
Or maybe I can take some to-go
Should I do that?
But break time is over soon
Next time~
[Let's come eat here next time -Tzuyang the owner]
Each and one of them taste different
[RIP sushi]
[Straight into her mouth]
3-second rule
[It's okay]
What's this?
I wonder what this is

Salmon belly
I've never had it before
I'll try it
How's it this tasty?
I'll gather everything in 1 place A stew is coming out
Fish roe stew is ready
You're eating a lot Are you done?
No, I'm just getting started
Is this watercress?
Tada~ I made watercress disappear
That's a lot
So much roe
That's so much
Radish too But I don't eat radish
Looks yummy
Fish roe is not dry

And..
It's not dry
[Brush on some soy sauce]
I've never seen a place give this much roe
That's a lot of uni roe
[Refreshing]
Now for the garlic shrimp that I've been saving up
What's the bottom? It's so good
This is the best
It's dinner time soon, so I better get going
I've been saving this too, but I guess I will have to eat it
Delicious even to the last bite
I will return right when break time ends
[Finishing it up with some coke]
That was such a nice meal
I better come here every day

Are you finished? Yes
Really? All of that?
The bill, please
Thank you, bye bye
Thank you Thank you
As you can see, this whole block is filled with restaurants
This place is really good too I came here like 3 times
Let's get back to work! [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
